# komodo_procedure (Data Source)

Reads an existing Komodo procedure resource.

## Example Usage

```terraform
data "komodo_procedure" "example" {
  id = "6627c3e4f1a2b3c4d5e6f7a8"
}
```

<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Optional

- `id` (String) The procedure identifier (ObjectId). One of `name` or `id` must be set.
- `name` (String) The unique name of the procedure. One of `name` or `id` must be set.

### Read-Only

- `failure_alert` (Boolean) Whether an alert is sent on procedure failure.
- `schedule` (Attributes) Schedule configuration for the procedure. (see [below for nested schema](#nestedatt--schedule))
- `stages` (String) JSON array of procedure stages.
- `webhook` (Attributes) Webhook configuration for the procedure. (see [below for nested schema](#nestedatt--webhook))

<a id="nestedatt--schedule"></a>
### Nested Schema for `schedule`

Read-Only:

- `alert_enabled` (Boolean) Whether an alert is sent on scheduled runs.
- `enabled` (Boolean) Whether the schedule is enabled.
- `expression` (String) The schedule expression.
- `format` (String) The schedule format: `Cron` or `English`.
- `timezone` (String) Timezone for the schedule (IANA TZ identifier).


<a id="nestedatt--webhook"></a>
### Nested Schema for `webhook`

Read-Only:

- `enabled` (Boolean) Whether webhook triggering is enabled.
- `secret` (String, Sensitive) The webhook secret override for this procedure.
